mapper.sql: FP.ID, MO.ID AS MENUOPERATE_ID, FP.TYPE_ID AS ROLE_ID, FP.GROUP_POWER_FLAG AS group_flag, FP.POSITION_POWER_FLAG AS position_flag, ASSIGN_POS_FLAG AS ASSIGN_POS_FLAG, ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG AS ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG, FP.UNLIMITED_POWER AS NO_RESTRICT_FLAG,0 as DEALER_PERMISSION_FLAG, 0 AS ASSIGN_CUSTOMPERMISSION_FLAG,0 AS ASSIGN_DATAPERMISSION_FLAG,0 as DEPARTMENT_FLAG,0 as ASSIGN_DEPT_FLAG, 0 as TYPEFLAG ,MO.FLOW_KEY

RP.ID, RP.MENUOPERATE_ID, RP.ROLE_ID, RP.GROUP_FLAG, RP.POSITION_FLAG, RP.ASSIGN_POS_FLAG,RP.DEPARTMENT_FLAG,RP.ASSIGN_DEPT_FLAG, RP.ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG, RP.NO_RESTRICT_FLAG,RP.DEALER_PERMISSION_FLAG,RP.ASSIGN_CUSTOMPERMISSION_FLAG,RP.ASSIGN_DATAPERMISSION_FLAG, 1 as TYPEFLAG ,MO.FLOW_KEY as FLOWKEY

FP.ID, MO.ID AS MENUOPERATE_ID, FP.TYPE_ID AS ROLE_ID, FP.GROUP_POWER_FLAG AS group_flag, FP.POSITION_POWER_FLAG AS position_flag, ASSIGN_POS_FLAG AS ASSIGN_POS_FLAG, 0 AS DEPARTMENT_FLAG,0 AS ASSIGN_DEPT_FLAG,ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG AS ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG, FP.UNLIMITED_POWER AS NO_RESTRICT_FLAG, 0 as DEALER_PERMISSION_FLAG,0 AS ASSIGN_CUSTOMPERMISSION_FLAG,0 AS ASSIGN_DATAPERMISSION_FLAG,0 as TYPEFLAG ,MO.FLOW_KEY as FLOWKEY

ru.USER_ID, rp.MENUOPERATE_ID, rp.URL_PATTERN, mo.CODE, max(rp.GROUP_FLAG) as GROUP_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.POSITION_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as POSITION_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.ASSIGN_POS_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ASSIGN_POS_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ASSIGN_STAFF_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.NO_RESTRICT_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as NO_RESTRICT_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.DEALER_PERMISSION_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as DEALER_PERMISSION_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.ASSIGN_DEPT_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as ASSIGN_DEPT_FLAG, CASE WHEN bool_or(rp.DEPARTMENT_FLAG) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as DEPARTMENT_FLAG
mapper.select: SELECT r.name ROLE_NAME,rp.MENUOPERATE_ID FROM rbac_rolepermission rp LEFT JOIN rbac_roleuser ru ON ru.ROLE_ID = rp.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN rbac_role r ON r.ID = ru.ROLE_ID WHERE ru.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ru.valid = 1 union SELECT r.name ROLE_NAME , rm.id as MENUOPERATE_ID FROM rbac_flow_permission rp INNER JOIN rbac_roleuser ru ON ru.ROLE_ID = rp.TYPE_ID INNER JOIN rbac_role r ON r.ID = ru.ROLE_ID INNER JOIN rbac_menuoperate rm ON rp.FLOW_KEY=rm.FLOW_KEY and rp.ACTIVITY_CODE = rm.CODE WHERE ru.USER_ID = #{userId} AND ru.valid = 1 AND rm.VALID=1 AND r.VALID=1 AND rp.FLOW_PERMISSION_TYPE = 'ROLE'

SELECT MI.SORT, MI.NAME, MI.MEMO, MI.MENU_TYPE, MI.CODE, MI.PARENT_ID, MI.IS_HIDE FROM rbac_rolepermission RP INNER JOIN rbac_menuoperate MO ON RP.MENUOPERATE_ID = MO.ID INNER JOIN rbac_menuinfo MI ON MO.MENUINFO_ID = MI.ID WHERE RP.ROLE_ID = #{roleId} AND MI.VALID = 1
